constraintSchema.description: A strategy constraint. For more information, refer to [the strategy constraint reference documentation](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/activation-strategies#constraints)

contextName.description: The name of the context field that this constraint should apply to.

operator.description: The operator to use when evaluating this constraint. For more information about the various operators, refer to [the strategy constraint operator documentation](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/activation-strategies#constraint-operators).

caseInsensitive.description: Whether the operator should be case sensitive or not. Defaults to `false` (being case sensitive).

inverted.description: Whether the result should be negated or not. If `true`, will turn a `true` result into a `false` result and vice versa.

values.description: The context values that should be used for constraint evaluation. Use this property instead of `value` for properties that accept multiple values.

value.description: The context value that should be used for constraint evaluation. Use this property instead of `values` for properties that only accept single values.

name.description: The name of the context field

description.description: The description of the context field.

stickiness.description: Does this context field support being used for [stickiness](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/stickiness) calculations

sortOrder.description: Used when sorting a list of context fields. Is also used as a tiebreaker if a list of context fields is sorted alphabetically.

createdAt.description: When this context field was created

usedInFeatures.description: Number of projects where this context field is used in

usedInProjects.description: Number of projects where this context field is used in

legalValues.description: Allowed values for this context field schema. Can be used to narrow down accepted input

project.description: The project this context field belongs to (if it is project-specific)

createContextFieldSchema.description: Data used to create a context field configuration.

description.description: A description of the context field

stickiness.description: `true` if this field should be available for use with [custom stickiness](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/stickiness#custom-stickiness), otherwise `false`

sortOrder.description: How this context field should be sorted if no other sort order is selected

legalValues.description: A list of allowed values for this context field

project.description: The project this context field belongs to (if it is project-specific)

name.description: The name of the context field.

createStrategyVariantSchema.description: This is an experimental property. It may change or be removed as we work on it. Please don't depend on it yet. A strategy variant allows you to attach any data to strategies instead of only returning `true`/`false`. Strategy variants take precedence over feature variants.

name.description: The variant name. Must be unique for this feature flag

weight.description: The weight is the likelihood of any one user getting this variant. It is an integer between 0 and 1000. See the section on [variant weights](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#variant-weight) for more information

weightType.description: Set to `fix` if this variant must have exactly the weight allocated to it. If the type is `variable`, the weight will adjust so that the total weight of all variants adds up to 1000. Refer to the [variant weight documentation](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#variant-weight).

stickiness.description: The [stickiness](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#variant-stickiness) to use for distribution of this variant. Stickiness is how Unleash guarantees that the same user gets the same variant every time

payload.description: Extra data configured for this variant

type.description: The type of the value. Commonly used types are string, number, json and csv.

dependentFeatureSchema.description: Feature dependency on a parent feature in read model

feature.description: The name of the feature we depend on.

enabled.description: Whether the parent feature should be enabled. When `false` variants are ignored. `true` by default.

variants.description: The list of variants the parent feature should resolve to. Leave empty when you only want to check the `enabled` status.

environmentSchema.description: A definition of the project environment

enabled.description: `true` if the environment is enabled for the project, otherwise `false`.

protected.description: `true` if the environment is protected, otherwise `false`. A *protected* environment can not be deleted.

sortOrder.description: Priority of the environment in a list of environments, the lower the value, the higher up in the list the environment will appear. Needs to be an integer

projectCount.description: The number of projects with this environment

apiTokenCount.description: The number of API tokens for the project environment

enabledToggleCount.description: The number of enabled toggles for the project environment

requiredApprovals.description: Experimental field. The number of approvals required before a change request can be applied in this environment.

exportQuerySchema.description: Available query parameters for  the deprecated export/import functionality.

downloadFile.description: Whether to return a downloadable file

features.description: Selects features to export by name. If the list is empty all features are returned.

downloadFile.description: Whether to return a downloadable file

tag.description: Selects features to export by tag.

downloadFile.description: Whether to return a downloadable file

project.description: Selects project to export the features from. Used when no tags or features are provided.

exportResultSchema.description: The result of the export operation, providing you with the feature flag definitions, strategy definitions and the rest of the elements relevant to the features (tags, environments etc.)

featureStrategies.description: All strategy instances that are used by the exported features in the `features` list.

featureEnvironments.description: Environment-specific configuration for all the features in the `features` list. Includes data such as whether the feature is enabled in the selected export environment, whether there are any variants assigned, etc.

contextFields.description: A list of all the context fields that are in use by any of the strategies in the `featureStrategies` list.

example.name: appName
example.description: Allows you to constrain on application name

featureTags.description: A list of all the tags that have been applied to any of the features in the `features` list.

segments.description: A list of all the segments that are used by the strategies in the `featureStrategies` list.

tagTypes.description: A list of all of the tag types that are used in the `featureTags` list.

example.name: simple
example.description: Used to simplify filtering of features

dependencies.description: A list of all the dependencies for features in `features` list.

links.description: A list of links for features in `features` list.

featureDependenciesSchema.description: Feature dependency connection between a child feature and its dependencies

feature.description: The name of the child feature.

dependencies.description: List of parent features for the child feature

featureEnvironmentSafeguardSchema.description: A safeguard configuration for a feature environment.

id.description: The unique ULID identifier for this safeguard

action.description: Disable a feature in an environment when triggered.

type.description: The type of action to perform.

featureName.description: The feature flag name this safeguard applies to.

environment.description: The environment this safeguard applies to.

project.description: The project this safeguard applies to.

triggerCondition.description: The condition that triggers the safeguard.

id.description: The unique identifier for this impact metric

metricName.description: The Prometheus metric series to query. It includes both unleash prefix and metric type and display name

timeRange.description: The time range for the metric data.

aggregationMode.description: The aggregation mode for the metric data.

labelSelectors.description: The selected labels and their values for filtering the metric data.

source.description: The Prometheus data source for this metric. Internal is the Unleash-managed Prometheus, external is a customer-provided Prometheus instance. Defaults to internal if not specified.

impactMetric.description: The metric configuration used to evaluate the safeguard condition.

featureEnvironmentSchema.description: A detailed description of the feature environment

enabled.description: `true` if the feature is enabled for the environment, otherwise `false`.

sortOrder.description: The sort order of the feature environment in the feature environments list

strategies.description: A list of activation strategies for the feature environment

variants.description: A list of variants for the feature environment

changeRequestIds.description: Experimental. A list of change request identifiers for actionable change requests that are not Cancelled, Rejected or Approved.

milestoneName.description: Experimental: The name of the currently active release plan milestone

milestoneOrder.description: Experimental: The zero-indexed order of currently active milestone in the list of all release plan milestones

totalMilestones.description: Experimental: The total number of milestones in the feature environment release plan

lastSeenAt.description: The date when metrics where last collected for the feature environment

hasStrategies.description: Whether the feature has any strategies defined.

hasEnabledStrategies.description: Whether the feature has any enabled strategies defined.

releasePlans.description: Release plans for this feature environment (only available when milestoneProgression feature flag is enabled)

yes.description: How many times the feature evaluated to true (enabled)

no.description: How many times the feature evaluated to false (disabled)

url.description: The URL the feature is linked to

featureLinkSchema.description: The link to any URL related to the feature

featureLinksSchema.description: A list of links for a feature

feature.description: The name of the child feature.

type.description: Type of the flag e.g. experiment, kill-switch, release, operational, permission

description.example: Controls disabling of the comments section in case of an incident

project.description: Name of the project the feature belongs to

enabled.description: `true` if the feature is enabled, otherwise `false`.

stale.description: `true` if the feature is stale based on the age and feature type, otherwise `false`.

favorite.description: `true` if the feature was favorited, otherwise `false`.

impressionData.description: `true` if the impression data collection is enabled for the feature, otherwise `false`.

createdAt.description: The date the feature was created

createdBy.description: User who created the feature flag

imageUrl.description: URL used for the user profile image

archivedAt.description: The date the feature was archived

lastSeenAt.description: The date when metrics where last collected for the feature. This field was deprecated in v5, use the one in featureEnvironmentSchema

environments.description: The list of environments where the feature can be used

strategies.description: This was deprecated in v5 and will be removed in a future major version

children.description: The list of child feature names. This is an experimental field and may change.

lifecycle.description: Current lifecycle stage of the feature

stage.description: The name of the current lifecycle stage

status.description: The name of the detailed status of a given stage. E.g. completed stage can be kept or discarded.

enteredStageAt.description: When the feature entered this stage

feature.description: The name of the parent feature

enabled.description: Whether the parent feature is enabled or not

variants.description: The list of variants the parent feature should resolve to. Only valid when feature is enabled.

dependencies.description: The list of parent dependencies. This is an experimental field and may change.

collaborators.description: Information related to users who have made changes to this feature flage.

users.description: Users who have made any changes to this feature flags. The list is sorted in reverse chronological order (most recent changes first)

items.description: A simple representation of a user.

name.description: The user's name, username, or email (prioritized in that order). If none of those are present, this property will be set to the string `unknown`

imageUrl.description: The URL to the user's profile image

url.description: The URL the feature is linked to

feature.description: The name of the feature this link belongs to

links.description: The list of links. This is an experimental field and may change.

featureStrategySchema.description: A single activation strategy configuration schema for a feature

id.description: A uuid for the feature strategy

name.description: The name or type of strategy

title.description: A descriptive title for the strategy

disabled.description: A toggle to disable the strategy. defaults to false. Disabled strategies are not evaluated or returned to the SDKs

featureName.description: The name or feature the strategy is attached to

sortOrder.description: The order of the strategy in the list

segments.description: A list of segment ids attached to the strategy

constraints.description: A list of the constraints attached to the strategy. See https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/activation-strategies#constraints

featureTagSchema.description: Describes a tag applied to a feature

featureName.description: The name of the feature this tag is applied to

type.description: The [type](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flags#tags) of the tag. This property is deprecated and will be removed in a future version of Unleash. Superseded by the `tagType` property.

value.description: The value of the tag. This property is deprecated and will be removed in a future version of Unleash. Superseded by the `tagValue` property.

createdByUserId.description: The id of the user who created this tag

importTogglesSchema.description: The result of the export operation for a project and environment, used at import

importTogglesValidateItemSchema.description: A description of an error or warning pertaining to a feature flag import job.

message.example: You cannot import a feature that already exist in other projects. You already have the following features defined outside of project default:

affectedItems.description: The items affected by this error message

errors.description: A list of errors that prevent the provided data from being successfully imported.

example.message: You cannot import a feature that already exist in other projects. You already have the following features defined outside of project default:

warnings.description: A list of warnings related to the provided data.

example.message: The following strategy types will be used in import. Please make sure the strategy type parameters are configured as in source environment:

permissions.description: Any additional permissions required to import the data. If the list is empty, you require no additional permissions beyond what your user already has.

legalValueSchema.description: Describes a legal value. Typically used to limit possible values for contextFields or strategy properties

overrideSchema.description: An override for deciding which variant should be assigned to a user based on the context name

contextName.description: The name of the context field used to determine overrides

values.description: Which values that should be overriden

parametersSchema.description: A list of parameters for a strategy

releasePlanMilestoneSchema.description: Schema representing the creation of a release plan milestone.

id.description: The milestone's ID. Milestone IDs are ulids.

sortOrder.description: The order of the milestone in the release plan.

releasePlanDefinitionId.description: The ID of the release plan/template that this milestone belongs to.

startedAt.description: The date and time when the milestone was started.

intervalMinutes.description: The interval in minutes before transitioning

transitionCondition.description: The condition configuration for the transition

progressionExecutedAt.description: The date and time when the milestone progression was executed.

pausedAt.description: The date and time when the milestone was paused.

strategies.description: A list of strategies that are attached to this milestone.

releasePlanMilestoneStrategySchema.description: Schema representing the creation of a release plan milestone strategy.

id.description: The milestone strategy's ID. Milestone strategy IDs are ulids.

milestoneId.description: The ID of the milestone that this strategy belongs to.

sortOrder.description: The order of the strategy in the list

title.description: A descriptive title for the strategy

name.description: The name of the strategy type

strategyName.description: The name of the strategy type

parameters.description: An object containing the parameters for the strategy

constraints.description: A list of the constraints attached to the strategy. See https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/activation-strategies#constraints

segments.description: Ids of segments to use for this strategy

disabled.description: A toggle to disable the strategy. defaults to false. Disabled strategies are not evaluated or returned to the SDKs

releasePlanSafeguardSchema.description: A safeguard configuration for a release plan.

id.description: The unique ULID identifier for this safeguard

action.description: The action to take when the safeguard is triggered.

type.description: The type of action to perform.

id.description: The ID of the release plan this safeguard applies to.

triggerCondition.description: The condition that triggers the safeguard.

id.description: The unique identifier for this impact metric

metricName.description: The Prometheus metric series to query. It includes both unleash prefix and metric type and display name

timeRange.description: The time range for the metric data.

aggregationMode.description: The aggregation mode for the metric data.

labelSelectors.description: The selected labels and their values for filtering the metric data.

source.description: The Prometheus data source for this metric. Internal is the Unleash-managed Prometheus, external is a customer-provided Prometheus instance. Defaults to internal if not specified.

impactMetric.description: The metric configuration used to evaluate the safeguard condition.

releasePlanSchema.description: Schema representing the creation of a release plan.

id.description: The release plan/template's ID. Release template IDs are ulids.

discriminator.description: A field to distinguish between release plans and release templates.

name.description: The name of the release template.

description.description: A description of the release template.

featureName.description: The name of the feature that uses this release plan.

environment.description: The environment that this release plan is for.

createdByUserId.description: Release template: The ID of the user who created this template.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the release template was created.

activeMilestoneId.description: The ID of the currently active milestone in this release plan.

milestones.description: A list of the milestones in this release template.

releasePlanTemplateId.description: The ID of the release plan template that this release plan is based on.

safeguards.description: An array of safeguards configured for this release plan.

safeguardTriggerConditionSchema.description: The condition that triggers the safeguard.

operator.description: The comparison operator for the threshold check.

threshold.description: The threshold value to compare against.

strategyVariantSchema.description: This is an experimental property. It may change or be removed as we work on it. Please don't depend on it yet. A strategy variant allows you to attach any data to strategies instead of only returning `true`/`false`. Strategy variants take precedence over feature variants.

name.description: The variant name. Must be unique for this feature flag

weight.description: The weight is the likelihood of any one user getting this variant. It is an integer between 0 and 1000. See the section on [variant weights](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#variant-weight) for more information

weightType.description: Set to `fix` if this variant must have exactly the weight allocated to it. If the type is `variable`, the weight will adjust so that the total weight of all variants adds up to 1000. Refer to the [variant weight documentation](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#variant-weight).

stickiness.description: The [stickiness](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#variant-stickiness) to use for distribution of this variant. Stickiness is how Unleash guarantees that the same user gets the same variant every time

payload.description: Extra data configured for this variant

type.description: The type of the value. Commonly used types are string, number, json and csv.

color.description: The hexadecimal color code for the tag type.

name.description: The name of the tag type.

description.description: The description of the tag type.
description.example: A tag type for describing the color of a tag.

icon.description: The icon of the tag type.

color.description: The hexadecimal color code for the tag type.

updateContextFieldSchema.description: Data to update an existing context field configuration.

description.description: A description of the context field

stickiness.description: `true` if this field should be available for use with [custom stickiness](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/stickiness#custom-stickiness), otherwise `false`

sortOrder.description: How this context field should be sorted if no other sort order is selected

legalValues.description: A list of allowed values for this context field

project.description: The project this context field belongs to (if it is project-specific)

variantSchema.description: A variant allows for further separation of users into segments. See [our excellent documentation](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#what-are-variants) for a more detailed description

name.description: The variants name. Is unique for this feature flag

weight.description: The weight is the likelihood of any one user getting this variant. It is a number between 0 and 1000. See the section on [variant weights](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#variant-weight) for more information

weightType.description: Set to fix if this variant must have exactly the weight allocated to it. If the type is variable, the weight will adjust so that the total weight of all variants adds up to 1000

stickiness.description: [Stickiness](https://docs.getunleash.io/concepts/feature-flag-variants#variant-stickiness) is how Unleash guarantees that the same user gets the same variant every time

payload.description: Extra data configured for this variant

type.description: The type of the value. Commonly used types are string, number, json and csv.

overrides.description: Overrides assigning specific variants to specific users. The weighting system automatically assigns users to specific groups for you, but any overrides in this list will take precedence.
